posts.cookedHtml:
Check out what’s new in the past few weeks!

API

  • Access the AI bot in the API playground
  • Hotfix for ComplexityException errors

Apps

  • New secrets manager for monday code
  • Developer center UI improvements
  • New monetization requirements for marketplace approval
  • Removed directives on June 1st, 2024
  • New monday tunnel domains
  • New ability to reorder integration recipes
